'''Crimson Fury''' was a [[Flight group/Legends|flight]] of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] attached to [[Red Hand Squadron]]. During the attack on the [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Helot's Shackle'']], they performed a strafing run on the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that allowed the rest of the Red Hands to subdue and board it.<ref name="Rebel Dawn" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
